I'm really disappointed with this power bank.

I watched lots of videos before purchasing it, but I didn't see any good brand of power bank on Daraz. Since Ultima is one of the popular brands in Nepal, I decided to go with this one. I didn't expect such poor-quality products from Ultima.

It's not even been a month since I started using my power bank, and now it’s not working anymore. Not even a single indicator light is glowing. They claim to offer a 6-month warranty, but when I tried to claim it through the official Ultima website and Daraz, they didn’t respond to my messages.

I’m not sure which brand to recommend for power banks, but I suggest avoiding Ultima power banks.
